prompt: Create a vertical watercolor fantasy portrait illustration of a South Asian man on a clean white background. The composition contains exactly 2 depictions of the same man: one giant elegant bust portrait filling the upper and right side of the canvas, and one smaller full-body standing figure in the lower left foreground. The giant portrait should have voluminous shoulder-length wavy black hair swept back, visible ears, neck, and the top of an ornate pale blue traditional sherwani collar, but the central face is covered by a large plain warm-brown rectangular censor block with no facial features. The smaller full-body figure also has shoulder-length wavy black hair and a matching smaller warm-brown blurred/covered face, standing calmly with hands clasped in front. Dress him in pale icy blue formal South Asian wedding attire: a long embroidered sherwani, translucent flowing outer robe or dupatta-like coat, white slim trousers, and silver embroidered loafers. Add delicate silver-white floral embroidery along the collar, cuffs, front placket, robe borders, and shoes. Use a soft watercolor style with fine ink-like detail in the hair and clothing, translucent washes, gentle gradients, paint splatters, and vertical drips. The background should be an ethereal pastel watercolor cloud of blue, lavender, pink, and violet around the figure, with exactly 6 visible butterflies: one blue butterfly at upper left, one purple butterfly at upper right, one pale beige butterfly left of the small figure, one small blue butterfly on the right side, one lavender butterfly near the lower left, and one faint pink-purple butterfly near the lower center. Include small star and flower accents, white speckles, and splash marks. Keep the overall mood elegant, romantic, airy, and dreamy, with no typography, no border, and no watermark.
